The Proposal:
The Rajashishtachar Department was expanded by the Government Decision at No. 2 in the context.
Three new offices have been created. Also, 23 new posts for these three new office bearers.
The creation of new posts has been approved in principle. High-level at No. 3 under reference
These 23 new posts (21) as per the minutes of the meeting of the Committee of Secretaries dated 4.06.2026
Creation of posts has been approved through regular 2 biannual mechanism).
The Government's Decisions:
General Administration Department, No. 2, as per Government Decision dated 17.11.2025
Extension of Rajashisthatachar subdivision with 3 new working groups (1) Rashi-4 (Foreign Direct Investment),
(2) Rashi-5 (subject to foreign nationals) and (3) Rashi-6 (international contacts) have been created.
The following new posts are being created for these new positions: -
table_trans: S-20: Rs. 56100-177500 (Inoperative pay scale after four years of continuous service)

23 posts (21 regular posts and 2 sepoy posts by way of recruitment)
